name: @lowwattlabs/portkeep
description: Port management and security auditing for self-hosted infrastructure. Discover, claim, and audit every listening port across local and remote nodes. Detect drift, score attack surface, and cross-reference against live threat intelligence including EPSS exploit probability scores.

scripts.plugin:build: npm run build && openclaw plugins build --entry ./dist/index.js
scripts.plugin:validate: npm run build && openclaw plugins validate --entry ./dist/index.js
